title: V1.67 P-sec — Desktop Shell Polish (10 V1.66 QC items)
completion_summary: P-sec Done. 10 V1.66 desktop QC items closed: event-driven daemon-status (Tauri emit), sidecar robust unwrap, CI per-arch fallback, idiomatic ExitRequested hook, restart_count reset, reqwest reuse, dir fsync, RuntimeLockGuard doc, backoff jitter, TOCTOU path-guard comments. fix-wave-1: restart_count reset only on manual startDaemon (not crash; preserves MAX_RESTART_ATTEMPTS budget), 10s event-status fallback re-sync. QC qc1+qc2 Approve + qc3 Approve after fix-wave-1; QA Pass. Closes 10x R-V166-QC*. 4 QC Suggestions -> residuals (V1.68+).
